english: gčód-pa (gcod pa) 1. to shut, 2. to lock (a door); *gyág-pa, gyáb-pa* (gyag pa, gyab pa) C., to shut (the door); gtáṅ-pa (gtan pa) Sch.: 'to lock up', prop. to bolt, to bar, v. sgo-gtáṅ (sgo gtan); bkúm-pa, bskúm-pa (bkum pa, bskum pa) Cs.: resp. to shut (a door); sgo bdúṅ - ba (sgo bdung ba) to knock, to rap at the door; *go śrúg-gu rag* (go shrug gu rag) W. I hear a rattling or rapping at the door. The ground floor of a house into which the door leads, is generally occupied by the cattle, hence: sgoi pyugs (sgoi phyugs) the cattle near the door, opp. to: púgs kyi nor (phugs kyi nor) the money in the inner chamber farthest from the door, cattle and money being thus the two poles or terminating points of household property. — rgyál-sgo (rgyal sgo) the principal door or entrance of a house or chamber (in Ld. also: *gyáz-go* (gyaz go)). — sgrig-sgo (sgrig sgo) folding-door Cs. — čáb-sgo (chab sgo) resp. for sgo (sgo) Cs., cf. gsáṅ-sgo (gsang sgo). — rtá-sgo (rta sgo) a door which may be passed through on horseback, viz. the door or gate of a court-yard or garden, open at the top, or a high castle-gate; in the latter case syn. to rgyál-sgo (rgyal sgo). — náṅ-sgo (nang sgo) the innermost door, bár-sgo (bar sgo) the middle door, pyí-sgo (phyi sgo) the outer door Pth. — tsé-sgo (tse sgo) v. 2, lás-sgo (las sgo) v. 3. — śél-sgo (shel sgo) glass-door; wing of a window, casement; gsáṅ-sgo (gsang sgo) secret door; Cs. resp, for sgo (sgo) (?). — 2. the boards that form the pane or square of a door, hence board, plank, v. sgo-rñám (sgo rnyam); tsé-sgo (tse sgo) a Chinese punishment, consisting of a thick board with an opening for the neck of the culprit, and resting on his shoulders; sgo gyóg-pa (sgo gyog pa) to put on the board of punishment. — bsé-sgo daṅ lčágs-sgo bdun sbrags (bse sgo dang lcags sgo bdun sbrags) a door constructed of sevenfold layers of leather and iron, used as a butt for shooting at. — 3. the aperture of a door, and hence aperture in general: sgo kún-nas (sgo kun nas) from all the apertures (of the body); źál-gyi sgo (zhal gyi sgo) resp. mouth Dzl.; mṅál-sgo (mngal sgo) the opening of the womb (v. mṅal (mngal)) frq.; skyé-bai sgo (skye bai sgo) id. less frq. Thgy.; dkyil-˚kor sgo-bźi-pa (dkyil 'khor sgo bzhi pa) a square figure with four openings, about thus: [ ]; the opening of a semicircle; entrance, passage, outlet, connecting passage, communication; also fig: way of mediation, of bringing an agreement about, ṅan-sóṅ-gi sgo (ngan song gi sgo) the entrance, the road, to misery viz.: to hell; dbáṅ-poi sgo (dbang poi sgo) the organs of sense, also sgo lṅa (sgo lnga) alone; sgo-gsúm (sgo gsum) the three media or spheres of moral activity, lus, ṅag, yid (lus, ngag, yid), action, word and thought frq.; bzá - ba daṅ btúṅ - bai sgo gčod - pa (bza' ba dang btung bai sgo gcod pa) to cut off the supply (of provisions) Pth.; bdag čos sgor ˚jug-pa źu (bdag chos sgor 'jug pa zhu) I beg to allow us to enter religion, to receive us as students or disciples Mil.; ˚gró-sgo ('gro sgo) Schr. 1. also búd-go, kyág-go (bud go, khyag go) W., expense, expenditure 2. ˚gó-go-tar śé'-pa ('go go tar she' pa) C. to relate accurately how a thing came to pass; lás-sgo (las sgo) 'door of intercourse, of trade', a commercial place or town, emporium Glr. Hence sgó-nas (sgo nas) with the genit. by means of, by, in the way of, according to, but never as connected with a person or joined to an infinitive: tabs dú-mai sgó-nas (thabs du mai sgo nas) in different ways, variously (often coinciding with: by various means); lus ṅag yid - kyi sgó-nas (lus ngag yid kyi sgo nas) in or by actions, words, and thoughts (e.g. to strive for virtue, cf. above sgo-gsúm (sgo gsum)) Dzl.; rnám-pa sna-tsógs-kyi sgó-nas (rnam pa sna tshogs kyi sgo nas) in every possible way Dzl.; dpei sgó-nas (dpei sgo nas) (to explain) by way of comparison Thgy.; mtsán-ñid-kyi sgó-nas (mtshan nyid kyi sgo nas) (to describe a thing) according to its characteristics Thgy.; rigs-kyi sgó - nas (rigs kyi sgo nas) (to divide) according to the species Lt.; ˚drá-bai sgó-nas btags-miṅ ste ('dra bai sgo nas btags ming ste) it being a name given to it from its resemblance to ... Wdṅ.; ... la prag-dóg-gi sgó-nas (la phrag dog gi sgo nas) from envy of ... Mil.; mi-snáṅ-bai sgó - nas (mi snang bai sgo nas) by way of invisibility, by being invisible Wdṅ. Comp. and deriv. sgo-káṅ (sgo khang) the entrance into a house, vestibule, porch, portal — sgo-kúṅ (sgo khung) opening of the door Mil. — sgo-k'yí (sgo khyi) a door-guarding dog, watch-dog. — sgo-˚kór (sgo 'khor) hinge of a door or gate. — sgo-gláys (sgo glags) Zam. = sgo-gtáṅ (sgo gtan) (?). — sgo-glégs (sgo glegs) the board or plank of a door Cs. — sgo-grám (sgo gram) the space near the door. — sgo-˚dríg (sgo 'drig) (Ld. *syon-dig* (syon dig)) door-frame, window-frame. — sgo-rgyáb (sgo rgyab) the space behind the door, within the door Glr. — *go-čág* (go cag) (lčags (lcags)) C. lock of a door. — *go(g)-táṅ* (go(g) tang) a bar or bolt (a small beam) to secure the door with. -
